title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・彩たる光集めて今

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan emerges triumphant. Impressed,
Oguri Cap likens her running to the prismatic
shine of a glass ornament.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan, Sakura Chiyono O, and Yaeno
Muteki are hailed as the new top three by the
audience, and share a joyous moment in time
together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan sears her vividly colorful light into
the fleeting moment, leaving a dazzling trail that
will shine on for all eternity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fully spent after the race, Mejiro Ardan leans on
me for support amidst thunderous applause and
cheers of her name.
